_comment: Master MCP server list. install.sh copies this file to .mcp.json at the project root of any repo it's run inside, and the SessionStart hook drops it into $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR. Only REMOTE (http/sse) MCPs work in Claude Code web sandboxes — local stdio MCPs stay in a separate local-only config (~/.claude.json on the Mac). claude.ai → Settings → Connectors does NOT inject into Claude Code sandboxes (verified April 2026). Gmail intentionally NOT listed here — replaced by the custom 'google-workspace-local' stdio server registered in ~/.claude.json on the Mac (authenticated to lyndsay@greatelmpartners.com; covers Drive + Docs + Gmail). Cloud Claude Code sandboxes have NO Gmail tools by design; queue email tasks for the next Mac session or use remote control to the Mac.
